scope.elevation_source: data/hometown_elevation.csv (USGS EPQS, falls back to Open-Elevation)

scope.distance_basis: nearest tracked facility geography that lists the athlete's sport

points.name: University of North Carolina, Chapel Hill
University of North Carolina at Charlotte

scope.decade_count_method: Profiles are counted in every decade that overlaps their parsed first/last active years.
scope.bias_note: The Team USA roster is current-profile biased; decade counts are not a complete historical census.

per_capita.climate_zone_residual_method: Unweighted mean of state per-100k profile rates within each state-level climate zone.

hs_conversion.metric: Team USA profiles per 1,000,000 NFHS participation slots
hs_conversion.participation_slot_note: NFHS totals count participation slots, not unique students; a student in multiple sports can be counted more than once.

college_efficiency.metric: matched Team USA profiles per athletic budget $M
